case_title: DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER IF THE DISCOVER CARD VS. THANH LUU et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER IF THE DISCOVER CARD AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, THANH DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-14-2012

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $304.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LUU, THANH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK, ISSUER IF THE DISCOVER CARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUU, THANH $4,426.13 PRINCIPAL, $304.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,730.63, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
